selection_basis: First-pass manual/vision curation from outputs/comfy_shot_set_v1_all_contact_sheets.jpg. Prioritized calm shot-4-like ocean look, kid-safe tone, less teeth, readable negative space, and coherent green/teal museum animation style.
caveats: SDXL Turbo still has recurring shark anatomy issues; this is a stronger storyboard/art-direction pass, not final brand art.
Shot 3 was the weakest batch because most variants were too teeth-forward; variant 10 is selected for calm silhouette/space rather than perfect storytelling.
Shot 4 style is the strongest direction: layered underwater trees/vegetation with small distant sharks and quiet awe.
